misc.text: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Commander of the German Army, LTG Christian Freuding, concluded a visit to Israel, hosted by MG Nadav Lotan, Commander of the IDF Ground Forces. For the first time, the two signed a formal cooperation agreement, expanding collaboration—a major milestone in the strategic partnership between Israel and Germany. Together, we stand ready to confront shared challenges and deepen our military cooperation for the future. — https://nitter.net/IDF/status/2024762807149854959#m

items.title: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Command
items.text: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Commander of the German Army, LTG Christian Freuding, concluded a visit to Israel, hosted by MG Nadav Lotan, Commander of the IDF Ground Forces. For the first time, the two signed a formal cooperation agreement, expanding collaboration—a major milestone in the strategic partnership between Israel and Germany. Together, we stand ready to confront shared challenges and deepen our military cooperation for the future. — https://nitter.net/IDF/status/2024762807149854959#m
